task: E: LLM Conservatism + Error Direction Audit
llm_conservatism_definition: LLM pred_strong_rate (0.04) << R4 pred_strong_rate (0.36); LLM predicts strong_action at 9x lower rate on silver=strong cases
llm_error_direction_note: LLM sends silver=strong cases to contradiction (GPT standard 14/25=56%, DeepSeek 5/25=20%) and mild/supported (GPT standard 10/25=40%, DeepSeek 19/25=76%); R4 sends 6/25=24% to contradiction and 10/25=40% to mild/supported
audit_disclaimer: Overnight non-API compute pipeline. All results are reanalysis of existing predictions on SILVER labels (pre-gold). Scalar baselines are PROXY (rule-based / LLM-label-derived), NOT official RIGOURATE. Low-prevalence simulation uses heuristic non-strong composition and is NOT a real natural-distribution study.
